name: bundleforge-marketing
description: Static marketing site for bundleforge.app, served by a tiny Node http server for Railway.

scripts.//start:web: Alias for Railway. The marketing service's stored config carries a stale startCommand of `npm run start:web` (a copy-paste from the main app) that the Railway API serviceInstanceUpdate didn't seem to clear. This alias makes the wrong command resolve to the right binary so the static site boots regardless of which entrypoint Railway picks.
